_doc: Execution traces for the failing job. These carry the REAL managed exception that the raw exit code 0xE0434352 hides: an unhandled System.Collections.Generic.KeyNotFoundException thrown at the 'Lookup region total' Assign while indexing a Dictionary with a key that was not present. No top-level Try/Catch caught it, so it escaped to the process boundary and collapsed to the CLR exit code. This is the payoff of the generic-exit-code playbook — recover the real exception from traces, do not stop at the code.

Error.Message: The given key 'EMEA-NORTH' was not present in the dictionary.
Error.StackTrace:
at System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary`2.get_Item(TKey key)
   at lambda_method(Closure, ActivityContext)
   at Microsoft.VisualBasic.Activities.VisualBasicValue`1.Execute(CodeActivityContext context)
   at System.Activities.CodeActivity`1.InternalExecuteInResolutionContext(CodeActivityContext context)
